overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3: Blood and Wine showing Geralt of Rivia walking through the sunlit medieval city of Beauclair. The character traverses cobblestone plazas and terraces adorned with Gothic architecture, passing statues and NPCs while approaching a grand palace complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic town square with cobblestone streets

events.description: character turns right onto elevated terrace path overlooking the sea
mounted knight in armor rides past on the right side

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily through the town square, turns right onto the terrace path, and continues walking alongside a stone railing

notable_agents.action: armored knight riding a brown horse along the terrace pathway

entered.detail: vibrant red three-story building with white window frames and flower boxes
tall stone clock tower with pointed roof rising above the town center
ornate carved stone railing along the elevated terrace walkway
distant mountain range with snow-covered peaks visible behind the city
tall Gothic spires and towers of the palace complex becoming visible

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a sunlit cobblestone town square with a distinctive red building on the left. He turns right onto an elevated terrace walkway with ornate stone railings, where a mounted knight passes by. The snow-capped mountains loom in the background while the palace towers become visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: seaside terrace with statues and ocean overlook

events.description: character stops briefly to look up at the large seated statue

agents.ego_description: Geralt approaches a massive seated statue, stops to look up at it, then continues walking along the terrace with the sea visible in the background

entered.detail: massive stone statue of a robed figure holding a sword, covered in moss
ornate Gothic stone archway with intricate tracery and pointed spire
blue ocean visible beyond the terrace railing with distant coastline
red stucco building with ornate windows on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Walking along the seaside terrace, Geralt passes a massive moss-covered statue of a seated figure holding a sword, pausing briefly to look up at it. The Gothic archway stands on the right with the blue sea visible beyond, while the palace towers grow larger in the center view.

scene_state.functional_zone: palace entrance gate and interior courtyard

events.description: character passes through the palace gate into the interior courtyard

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks toward the palace main gate, passes between the guardian statues through the archway, and enters the tree-shaded interior courtyard

entered.detail: large Gothic archway entrance with intricate carvings and red banners
pair of stone statues flanking the palace entrance gate
enclosed courtyard with trees and stairs visible through the gate
mature leafy tree providing shade in the palace courtyard

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches the palace main gate flanked by stone guardian statues and passes through the Gothic archway into the interior courtyard. The scene transitions from the open terrace to a tree-shaded courtyard with a large central tree and stairs leading up to the palace proper.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit medieval city that transitions from an open town square into the secluded courtyard of a grand palace. It begins with Geralt traversing a cobblestone square past a red building before turning onto an elevated terrace walkway where a mounted knight passes against a backdrop of snow-capped mountains. As the camera follows him along the seaside terrace, the view shifts to include a massive moss-covered statue and a Gothic archway that frames the blue sea, while the palace towers grow increasingly prominent in the center. The scene then moves toward the palace main gate, passing between stone guardian statues and through the archway. Finally, the open coastal light gives way to a tree-shaded interior courtyard featuring a large central tree and stairs leading up to the palace proper.
